title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'life support'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump calls the Iran ceasefire "unbelievably weak" and says it is on "life support" after rejecting Iran's conditions to end the war.

title: Trump news and schedule for May 11 from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: Happy belated Mother’s Day. Trump hosts a maternal healthcare event and the Indiana University football team today. Trump news rundown for May 11.

title: Trump calls for suspending the federal gas tax amid soaring pump prices
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he wants to suspend the federal tax on gasoline amid soaring energy prices during the United States war with Iran.

title: When is President Trump going to China? See his schedule
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is headed to China this week, where the war in Iran is sure to be a topic of discussion. When will he be gone? See schedule.

title: When, where to vote early in Pittsburgh before PA primary election
shortDescription: Primary Election Day in Pittsburgh and Allegheny County is May 19, and the deadline to cast your vote early is nearly here.

title: Here's what's at stake in midterm elections this week
shortDescription: Two states choose candidates for U.S. House and Senate.

title: Will the federal gas tax be suspended?
shortDescription: Energy Secretary Chris Wright said the Trump administration is open to suspending the federal gas tax in an interview on Meet the Press.

title: Trump rejects Iran's latest offer, says ceasefire on 'life support'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was "unbelievably weak" and called its peace proposal "garbage" amid a flare-up in fighting.

title: Trump says Iran’s response ‘totally unacceptable’
shortDescription: President Trump called Iran’s response to a potential peace plan “totally unacceptable.”

title: Gas prices are skyrocketing. Will Trump pause the federal gas tax?
shortDescription: Americans pay about 18 cents per gallon of tax on gas and 24 cents per gallon on diesel fuel.

title: Trump calls Iran response to peace plan 'unacceptable': See the latest
shortDescription: The Trump administration's framework proposed a pause in fighting while officials hammer out a permanent peace plan.

title: Melania Trump talks Barron, her mother
shortDescription: The famously private first lady Melania Trump offered USA TODAY a glimpse behind the curtain of her role as a mother and daughter.

title: Trump says he expects Iran response on peace talks soon
shortDescription: The president told reporters he expected a response as soon as Friday evening. The White House did not answer questions about whether the response had been received yet.

title: GOP infighting in Congress slows Trump agenda as midterms loom
shortDescription: If you ask Speaker Mike Johnson, he's working miracles on Capitol Hill with a historically small House majority. Still, dysfunction reigns.

title: Ukraine, Russia confirm 3-day ceasefire as Trump hopes for 'big extension'
shortDescription: The Ukraine-Russia ceasefire would include a suspension of all "kinetic activity" and a swap of 1,000 prisoners from each country, President Trump said.

title: FBI questions Wisconsin election official about 2020 presidential vote
shortDescription: A Federal Bureau of Investigation agent interviewed a high-ranking state election official in recent weeks about the 2020 presidential election.

title: 'The View' probe sparks First Amendment legal filings by ABC
shortDescription: After months of probing into 'The View,' ABC News has filed a complaint against the FCC, saying it violated the network's First Amendment rights.

title: Can Trump's tough-guy approach work with Iran?
shortDescription: Wars are easier to start than end. A look at the hard truth Trump is facing in Iran.

title: Experts say Trump 'not prepared' for pandemic
shortDescription: Infectious disease experts are sounding the alarm on the Trump administration's preparedness for a pandemic after significant cuts to the CDC.
